workbook.source: Public source URL or citation goes here.
workbook.version: Workbook version or release date if known.
workbook.local_workbook_path: tmp/private-workbooks/<local-file>; do not commit the workbook.

scenario.name: example-scenario
scenario.description: Short human-readable summary of the scenario change.

changed_inputs.label: Scenario selection parameter
changed_inputs.notes: Use public or sanitized labels only.

outputs.label: Key output metric
outputs.notes: Use match, mismatch, blocked, or needs-review.

run.excel_capture_method: Manual workbook run or documented local script.
run.python_capture_method: Modelwright generated-model run or notebook workflow.
